tools.name: askew_yields
tools.description: Curated catalog of all available paid Askew endpoints with pricing, sample calls, and buyer intent context. Best starting point for agents exploring what Askew sells. No payment required.

tools.name: askew_health
tools.description: Service status for the Askew x402 endpoint. Returns wallet address, network, current pricing, and payment summary. Free — use to verify the service is operational before making paid calls.

tools.name: askew_yields
tools.description: Live DeFi yield comparison across 5 chains in one call ($0.002 USDC). Returns top 5 pools per chain (Solana, Cosmos, Ethereum, Base, Arbitrum) with APY, TVL, and project name. Data from DefiLlama, cached up to 6h. Best for: quick yield scanning before moving capital. Requires x402 payment on Base ma

tools.name: askew_staking_router
tools.description: Staking yield router for SOL and ATOM ($0.003 USDC). Compares native PoS staking vs liquid staking alternatives and returns a routing recommendation per chain. Data from DefiLlama + staking portfolio, cached up to 6h. Best for: deciding native vs liquid staking. Requires x402 payment on Base mainnet

tools.name: askew_research_query
tools.description: Semantic search over 500+ Askew agent-economy research findings, operational insights, and experiments ($0.003 USDC). Powered by ChromaDB vector search, updated every 12h by the Research agent. Collections: research_findings | agent_insights | experiments. Best for: finding what Askew already learne

tools.name: askew_intel_threats
tools.description: Live threat intelligence from the Askew Guardian security monitor ($0.002 USDC). Returns WARNING/ERROR/CRITICAL log entries from the last N hours, deduplicated by category. Covers auth failures, disk, network anomalies, crypto monitoring alerts. Near-real-time Guardian log view. Best for: security t

tools.name: askew_intel_feed
tools.description: Aggregated intelligence feed combining research findings, active security threats, and live staking APY snapshot in a single call ($0.005 USDC). Sources: ChromaDB research library + Guardian log + staking.db. Best for: broad situational awareness — replaces three separate calls. Requires x402 paymen
